/usr/bin/c++   -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -g   CMakeFiles/memesim.dir/src/verymeme/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memesim.dir/src/verymeme/file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memesim.dir/src/verymeme/geom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memesim.dir/src/verymeme/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memesim.dir/src/programs/memesim.cpp.o  -o memesim verilog/libverilated_library.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_stacktrace_backtrace.so
